title: Otis Worldwide: An Option To Get In At A Lower Level
text: Otis Worldwide made a new 52-week low last week. The company has leading franchises in elevators and escalators, with a strong service business that has a high retention rate.

title: Otis (OTIS) Rides on Innovation Amid Russia-Ukraine Woes
text: Digital innovation and strong prospects benefit Otis (OTIS) despite the ongoing crisis in Ukraine.
